title: Creamy Jasmine Russian Rice Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious Russian-inspired dish featuring creamy jasmine rice, melted cheese, and tender chicken wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions.
Prepare chicken breast by seasoning with salt, garlic, and flour.
Grill or saut4 chicken breast until cooked through.
Wash and dry pandan leaves for wrapping.
In a separate pan, heat sour cream and lemon juice over medium heat until warm and bubbly.
Shred or chop cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine cooked jasmine rice, shredded chicken, and warmed sour cream mixture.
Stir in chopped parsley and mozzarella cheese until well combined.
Assemble wraps by spooning rice mixture onto the center of a pandan leaf, then adding additional cheese on top.
Fold and roll the leaf to enclose the filling, repeat with remaining ingredients.
